prose:
WP01 implements the SS1 Image Build Pipeline per spec. v1 review raised 4 issues (1 critical on M1, 1 major on ruff, 1 minor on TOCTOU, 1 info on duplication); this v2 fix-up cycle resolved all of them.

Issue 1 (M1 critical): _acquire_lock was a TOCTOU exists()/write_text() pair that allowed multiple concurrent processes to "acquire" the lock. Replaced with POSIX-atomic O_CREAT|O_EXCL + fcntl.flock(LOCK_EX|LOCK_NB). Empirical proof in test_concurrent_acquire_is_atomic: 8 concurrent acquires yield exactly 1 winner. test_concurrent_run_is_blocked_by_lock now uses a real fcntl.flock from a separate fd to simulate a live holder.

Issue 2 (ruff major): tools/build_image.py had 11 E402 errors due to a sys.path shim before module imports. Converted to a package layout (tools/build_image/__init__.py + tools/build_image/__main__.py) so the shim is no longer needed. ruff check tools/ exits 0; invocation is now python -m tools.build_image.

Issue 3 (TOCTOU minor): _check_version now uses try/open/except FileNotFoundError instead of exists()/open() pattern.

Issue 4 (info): _one_line collapsed to a single definition in tools/lib/log.py; the duplicate in pve_client.py is now a thin import shim for backwards compat.

Quality gates: 22/22 pytest pass; coverage 85%; ruff check tools/ clean; mypy --strict clean (12 source files). CLI smoke-tested: python -m tools.build_image --help prints argparse usage.

files_created.description: CLI entry point. argparse parses --talos-version/--pve-*/--build-dir/--versions-yaml/--audit-log/--verbose/--dry-run. BuildImage dataclass wraps run(), version validation, build/.build.lock, idempotency via image-id.txt, dry-run, _run_packer with PACKER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=600, cleanup-destroy-half-baked-VM on _PackerFailed. Exit codes: 2 (version abort), 3 (packer failed), 10 (lock held). sys.path shim allows direct `python tools/build_image.py` invocation.

StructuredLogger dataclass with info/error/warn. JSON-line audit log (one dict per line). _scrub() drops keys whose name contains secret|token|password|ssh_key|sshkey (case-insensitive). 8-hex-char trace_id per instance. Thread-safe with _lock. Console output is single-line (no dict dumps).
SecretLoader dataclass wrapping os.environ. get(name) raises if absent; get_many(names) raises if any missing. Logs only key names (never values).
PveClient wrapping qm list/stop/destroy. Best-effort destroy swallows non-zero exit. find_template_vmid(name) parses `qm list` output via regex to map name -> VMID.

Packer template. proxmox-clone builder from base VM 999, target template VMID 900, EFI boot, scsi_controller virtio-scsi-single, qemu_agent true. Build provisioner: `sleep 30 && sudo poweroff`. All Packer + plugin + Talos versions are sourced from variables resolved from versions.yaml via -var-file at invocation.
SS1 (Image Build Pipeline) glossary: Image Template, Build Lock, Packer Timeout, Versions Matrix, Audit Log Entry, Half-Baked VM, Talos Version.
Inserts repo root into sys.path so `from tools.lib...` imports resolve under pytest.
4 tests: JSON-per-line audit, key redaction (keys dropped not masked), nested dict redaction, trace_id per instance.
5 tests: env round-trip, missing-key raises, no value leak to log, batch get_many, batch raises on first missing.
4 tests: qm destroy invocation, best-effort destroy continues on non-zero exit, find_template_vmid parses qm list, returns None when absent.

8 tests: unknown talos version exits 2 + no Packer invoked; known version proceeds; idempotent skip when image-id.txt exists; Packer failure triggers cleanup + no image-id.txt + non-zero exit; secrets never logged on failure; lock blocks concurrent run; lock acquired/released within a single run; --dry-run does not invoke Packer.
Master version matrix. talos.v1.10.0 = {kernel: ..., k3s: ..., cilium: ...}. packer pin. hashicorp/proxmox plugin pin. pinned_toolchain section. Authoritative source for _check_version() validation.

Targets: build-image (runs tools/build_image.py), clean-image (rm -rf build/), test (pytest tools/tests/), lint (ruff + mypy), install-deps (pip install --user pytest pytest-cov mypy ruff types-PyYAML). build-image requires PVE_ENDPOINT/PVE_TOKEN_ID/PVE_TOKEN_SECRET env vars.
Selective strict mypy: tools.lib.* and tools.build_image are --strict; tools.tests.* is ignore_errors.
Package entry-point shim: enables `python -m tools.build_image` invocation. Wraps sys.exit(main()) — no business logic.

Converted to a package layout (Issue 2 fix). Adds _lock_fd field; _acquire_lock uses O_CREAT|O_EXCL + fcntl.flock(LOCK_EX|LOCK_NB) for atomic exclusive locking (Issue 1 critical fix); _release_lock uses LOCK_UN+close+unlink. _check_version uses try/open/except FileNotFoundError to drop the TOCTOU window (Issue 3).

validator.details: 22/22 pytest pass (added test_concurrent_acquire_is_atomic: empirical M1 proof -- 8 concurrent acquires yield exactly 1 winner); coverage 85%; ruff check tools/ clean (no E402); mypy --strict on tools.lib.* + tools.build_image clean (12 source files). CLI smoke-tested: python -m tools.build_image --help prints argparse usage.
